settings.confirmationMessage: Thanks — we're reviewing your operation and will follow up within one business day to confirm whether an audit is the right next step.

hero.title: Brody Billings
hero.subtitle: Entrepreneur, investor, and systems builder helping founder-led companies find the constraint and build the system around it.
hero.scriptText: I build, invest in, and improve businesses with operating discipline, capital clarity, and practical systems.

focusAreas.title: Operations
focusAreas.text: I organize the moving parts so owners can see where time, service, reporting, and accountability are leaking.

focusAreas.title: Finance
focusAreas.text: Capital efficiency, cash flow clarity, and financial analysis that support better operating decisions.

focusAreas.title: AI Execution
focusAreas.text: Practical AI for calls, intake, onboarding, scheduling, customer engagement, and decision support.

focusAreas.title: Strategy
focusAreas.text: Business coaching, marketing consulting, process improvement, and executive-level operating clarity.

about.body: I am an entrepreneur and investor from Mapleton, Utah, with more than two decades of experience across import, distribution, consulting, retail, restaurants, real estate, and technology.

method.intro: Monument Solutions helps organizations understand what is actually preventing growth before recommending technology, hiring, or process change.

steps.title: Find the real constraint.
steps.text: The audit starts with leadership, communication, systems, customer experience, and culture before recommending software or spend.

steps.title: Turn symptoms into signal.
steps.text: Financial analysis, risk management, and operational review clarify what is actually preventing growth.

steps.title: Build the operating moves.
steps.text: The diagnosis becomes practical changes that improve accountability, cash flow, execution, and team communication.

steps.title: Embed AI into the workflow.
steps.text: Automation is deployed inside the real business process so AI becomes an accelerator instead of an experiment.

method.quote: Technology can accelerate progress, but people create it. If leadership, communication, and accountability improve, AI becomes much more valuable.

offers.heading: Scaling founder-led businesses through smart automation, strategic outsourcing, capital efficiency, and AI-powered innovation.

items.title: Finance
items.text: Help founder-led companies use capital more efficiently so they can scale without burning cash or taking unnecessary risk.

items.title: Strategy
items.text: Support business strategy, marketing decisions, process improvement, and executive operating clarity.

items.title: AI
items.text: Explore practical AI use cases for customer engagement, call centers, automation, decision-making, and lower overhead.

items.title: Automation
items.text: Automate sales, marketing, customer service, and repetitive workflows so the team stays focused on revenue-producing work.

portfolio.intro: The businesses, investments, and operating experience behind the way I think about systems, capital, customer service, and execution.

properties.heading: Real Estate
properties.intro: Commercial, residential, and seller-financed properties shaped by market analysis, creative deal structure, and long-term operating value.
properties.calloutText: I look for opportunities where better structure, clearer operations, and flexible financing can help both sides reach a practical outcome.

proof.heading: A practical builder with a people-first view of how businesses actually improve.

footer.heading: Work with me.
footer.text: Answer a few questions about your operation. If an audit is the right next step, we will follow up within one business day.
